device_name: OTIS 2.1 Optical Coherence Tomography System, THiA Optical Coherence Tomography System
intended_use: imaging tool in the evaluation of excised human tissue microstructure by providing two-dimensional, cross-sectional, real-time depth visualization with image review manipulation software for identifyi
